channel.title: Cloud on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Cloud and local sandboxes for GitHub Copilot now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now supports secure, isolated sandboxes for tool execution in both local and cloud environments, available in public preview. The update is intended to isolate Copilot actions from the rest of the system.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Multiparty private offers in Microsoft Marketplace expand to 30 countries in Europe
item.description:
Microsoft Marketplace multiparty private offers are now generally available in 30 European countries. The update lets partners procure third-party cloud and AI solutions for customers and helps software companies expand into new markets through existing partner relationships.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: security: CVE-2026-31431: Copy Fail vulnerability enables Linux root privilege escalation across cloud environments
item.description:
Microsoft says CVE-2026-31431 (“Copy Fail”) is a high-severity Linux vulnerability that can be used for root privilege escalation across cloud and Kubernetes environments. The post says a working exploit is already in the wild and urges organizations to detect and mitigate quickly.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: github: View and manage agent sessions from issues and projects
item.description:
GitHub now lets you view and steer cloud agent sessions directly from issues and projects. This adds visibility into agent activity without leaving the current workflow.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: dotnet: Your Migration’s Source of Truth: The Modernization Assessment
item.description:
The post introduces GitHub Copilot Modernization and focuses on the assessment report as the source of truth for cloud modernization work. It frames the report as part of the migration process and positions it as the primary reference for modernization planning.

  • Source: .NET
